item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milageplus things they wont use like miles/pluspoints they wouldnt mind gifting or using for my future travel things lemme know via dm here. I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: The Onion officially owns InfoWars
item.description: It has been a long time in the works, but InfoWars, the fake news outlet long ran by professional hatemonger Alex Jones is officially part of The Onion. (https://theonion.info) It will be overseen by new Creative Director Tim Heidecker.
item.dc:creator: smashpro1

item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
7
8
9

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @thecommoncolor painted this little guy. Fantastic work. Check out their other posts for more! Nominated by: @scotswahey
27 Man Tax: Manuel Kornisiuk
“Reflect upon your present blessings — of which every man has many — not on your past misfortunes, of which all men have some.” - Charles Dickens So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Women and men
item.dc:creator: slimvictor

item.title: Video Memes Vol 2
item.description: As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd Miscellaneous and Videos https://imgur.com/gallery/0k0ca7O NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P

item.title: A step in the right direction.
item.description: https://www.goodnewsnetwork.org/maryland-to-become-first-us-state-to-ban-surveillance-pricing/ This is a follow up to the idea of Super Markets using facial recognition, app purchases, and other things to adjust prices on the fly for consumers.

item.title: InfoWars has been acquired by the Onion
item.description: In a deal originally scuttled at the end of '24 after a Trump judge blocked it. The Onion finally owns Alex Jones's InfoWars and has announced Tim Heidecker (Tim and Eric) as it's new creative head and changed the Logo to rainbow colored. Announcement video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ldWnJ_LFJUI
item.dc:creator: Kalli

item.title: Lyft driver kicks racist couple out of his car.
item.description: This happened back in May of 2022. Driver, James Bode, kicks racist bar owner and her husband out of his car in Pennsylvania. This is their restaurant: https://www.yelp.com/biz/fossils-last-stand-catasauqua

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1674 (six foot turkey)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Kea love to chew up cars.
The kokako may or may not be extinct.
Goddammit, the politicians in my state are morons.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: She did not advance
item.description: Sophie Powers delivers a bold and humorous audition performance of her song “ST*U” during American Idol 2025 – Season 23, Episode 3 (Auditions Week 3). She was never a serious contestant, the producers chose her because they knew of her as a quirky artist. Oh and she's Canadian. I'm just posting because i like the song.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Memes vol 664 Marvel and DC
item.description:
Guys we’re getting so close to volume 666 what should I do
Me at the dentist
Guys I’m rewatching heated rivalry rn and the all the things she said club scene is on my fave oh my god Shane looks like he’s going to kill himself
And now ilya’s jerking it in the shower I fucking love this show (have you guys seen the thing where people say the winter soldier walks like it’s heavy)
This is one of my favorite Superman memes it’s so funny
I had a Pekingese
Nobody say anything
Marvel make Tommy a sorcerer
Bruce and Gertie tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: GovBrief Today #444
item.description: Harmeet Dhillon wants every ballot Detroit cast in 2024. Her Civil Rights Division at the Justice Department gave Wayne County two weeks to hand over 865,000 ballots, envelopes, and receipts, with a federal lawsuit waiting if it refuses. The justification rests on three fraud cases that aren't from 2024 and that Michigan's own officials caught and prosecuted. DOJ already seized 2020 ballots in Georgia and pulled records from Arizona. Now Wayne County is the target in a battleground state where Democrats are defending the governor's mansion and a Senate seat in November. Trump told House Republicans in January that Democrats would "find a reason to impeach me" if they won the midterms, and the years-long warnings about voting under a second Trump term are coming true. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and demand legislation to keep state election records out of DOJ's reach before the next demand letter lands in your state. We've emailed 7,000+ stories over 444 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Embedded links, data, images at the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260419-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/cuba-deadline [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr19 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/michigan-ballots [4] https://go.govbrief.today/wright-gas [5] https://go.govbrief.today/tariff-refund-portal [6] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-attack-181 [7] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-sudan Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
